name: GREENWAY TECHNOLOGIES, INC. & SUBSIDIARIES
business: Greenway Technologies, Inc. develops and sells proprietary gas-to-liquids (GTL) conversion systems using its G-Reformer technology to convert natural gas into syngas, which is then processed into liquid fuels, high-value chemicals, methanol, and hydrogen. The company targets oil and gas operators seeking to monetize associated gas, flared gas, stranded gas, or other natural gas streams. It is currently a development-stage company with no revenues.

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the research and development of proprietary gas-to-liquids (GTL) synthesis gas (Syngas) conversion systems and micro-plants that can be scaled to meet specific gas field production requirements.
Recent research and development activity have shown that the technology can also allow the extraction of high-value chemicals and alcohols.
G-Reformer units can be deployed to process a variety of natural gas streams including pipeline gas, associated gas, flared gas, vented gas, coal-bed methane and/or biomass gas.
